trm:term.trm:name: Clearing
trm:term.trm:definition: The exchange of transaction details between acquirer and issuer to calculate net obligations before settlement.

pr:section.pr:title: Capture and Clearing
pr:section.pr:shortdesc: Finalizing the charge and exchanging details.
pr:section.pr:p: After goods or services are delivered, the merchant captures the authorized amount. This triggers clearing: the acquirer and issuer exchange transaction details to compute net obligations.

pr:steps.pr:step: Merchant submits capture request with authorization reference.
Acquirer batches captures for the clearing network.
Clearing network computes net positions between institutions.
Net settlement instructions are sent to both parties.

pr:section.pr:title: Settlement
pr:section.pr:shortdesc: Actual movement of funds between institutions.
pr:section.pr:p: Settlement occurs when the clearing network instructs fund transfers between the acquirer and issuer. Once settled, the transaction is final under normal circumstances.

org:task.org:actor: Merchant initiates, acquirer and network execute.

rel:relation.rel:note: Clearing computes obligations; settlement executes them.
Capture is initiated through the acquirer.
